# capidocs API

> Documentation platform API for technical content management. Provides content operations, user management, and real-time collaboration features.

Base URL: https://api.capidocs.dev/v2

## Pages
- [Home](#home): Technical Documentation Platform & API
- [Getting Started](#getting-started): Overview
- [Authentication](#authentication): API Key Authentication
- [API Endpoints](#endpoints): User Management
- [Componentes](#components): Qué puede llevar una sección
- [Bloques de código](#code-blocks): Bloque básico
- [Configuración](#configuration): Un solo archivo
- [Documenta tu API](#document-api): Anatomía de un endpoint
- [Funciones de la plataforma](#features): Búsqueda instantánea
- [User Management](#users-endpoint): Retrieve a list of users with optional filtering and pagination. Supports various query parameters for customizing the results.
- [Data Operations](#data-endpoint): Create a new data item in the system. Supports various data types and custom metadata.
- [Webhooks](#webhooks): Webhook Events
- [Error Handling](#error-handling): HTTP Status Codes
